room_index.rounding: Round to nearest 0.25. Cap at 5.0 for table lookup.

Hm.description: Effective mounting height = ceiling height − working plane height

fixture_count.rounding: ALWAYS round UP. Never round down.

Φ.description: Design lumen output per luminaire — NOT initial lumens

UF.description: Utilisation factor from photometric data or table

MF.description: Maintenance factor = LLMF × LSF × LMF × RSMF

components.LLMF: Lamp Lumen Maintenance Factor — LED L80 at 50,000h: 0.80
components.LMF: Luminaire Maintenance Factor — normal office annual clean: 0.90
components.RSMF: Room Surface Maintenance Factor — normal office annual: 0.94

maintenance_factor.note: Always flag as [ASSUMPTION: ...] unless cleaning regime confirmed

spacing_check.note: SHR_max from photometric data. 1.5 is conservative default.

initial_vs_design_lumens.rule: If lumen_type = 'initial' and L80 rated life stated, apply LLMF = 0.80
initial_vs_design_lumens.flag_required: [ASSUMPTION: Initial lumens converted to design lumens using LLMF = {LLMF}. Design lumens = {design_lumens} lm.]
